title: Sales Manager Vacancy at DLF - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at DLF - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!
